differential_diagnoses: Bipolar I disorder with catatonic or delirious features
Occult substance toxicity or withdrawal (e.g., non-benzodiazepine GABAergic agents)
next_steps: Obtain serum TSH, free T4, total T3, and TSH-receptor antibody (TRAb) levels immediately
Initiate intravenous thiamine for potential Wernicke's encephalopathy
Calculate Burch-Wartofsky Point Scale to assess for thyroid storm
Consider lumbar puncture for NMDA receptor antibody testing in CSF
Perform continuous bedside telemetry monitoring for arrhythmias
Monitor thyroid-related cardiovascular symptoms and initiate appropriate pharmacological blockade if thyrotoxicosis is confirmed
Evaluate for autonomic instability (fever, fluctuating blood pressure) and provide supportive care
